label: Gentle Female - Coral
instructions: Warm, gentle, emotionally present female voice. Speak like intimate character dialogue, not narration. Keep Chinese natural and softly expressive.

label: Soft Female - Shimmer
instructions: Soft, tender female voice with restrained emotion. Suitable for shy, caring, vulnerable, or late-night intimate scenes.

label: Clear Female - Nova
instructions: Clear, friendly female voice. Keep it bright, conversational, and emotionally responsive.

label: Expressive Female - Verse
instructions: Expressive, lively female voice. Good for playful, teasing, excited, or emotionally animated characters.

label: Mature Female - Marin
instructions: Mature, smooth female voice. Keep delivery grounded, elegant, and emotionally controlled.

label: Neutral Female - Alloy
instructions: Neutral, balanced female-leaning delivery. Keep the tone natural, not announcer-like.

label: Calm Male - Echo
instructions: Calm, steady male voice. Speak conversationally with quiet confidence, not like a lecture.

label: Deep Male - Onyx
instructions: Deep, serious male voice with controlled intensity. Good for protective, disciplined, or high-status characters.

label: Modern Male - Ash
instructions: Modern, casual male voice. Keep delivery natural, cool, and close to everyday conversation.

label: Story Male - Fable
instructions: Warm, friendly male voice with light storytelling color. Keep it as dialogue, not audiobook narration.

label: Refined Male - Cedar
instructions: Refined, smooth male voice. Suitable for mature, elegant, mentor, or romantic adult characters.

label: Warm Male - Ballad
instructions: Warm, emotionally open male voice. Good for romantic, reflective, or vulnerable scenes.

label: Neutral - Sage
instructions: Neutral, balanced voice. Keep gender presentation subtle and delivery emotionally responsive.

label: Neutral - Alloy
instructions: Neutral baseline voice. Use only when a character has no strong voice direction.
